title: Mosquito Beast
content:
Loyal Pet of 
Wang Lin
. Found in a Valley in the Sea of Devils. Wang Lin found its species with Tu Si's memory but found him weaker in size and strength.

When Wang Lin encountered it, it show great hiding skill and boast greater speed than its strength show.

It became a real mosquito king when, with the help of 
Wang Lin
, it killed and absorbed a purple mosquito king of the 
Wind Celestial Realm
.
[
1
]
Warning Spoiler

By coming in contact with the Immortal Astral Principle, it begins an atavism toward its ancestor's form, a Principle Beast.

Because of this Atavism, it is able to survive in the Void between the Immortal Astral Continent and the Cave World.
